name: PMO Website
summary: Central PMO portal to surface project status, governance artefacts and reporting in one place. Core pages and the status board are live in staging; content migration and stakeholder sign-off are the remaining critical path items.
progress: Information architecture and page templates approved.
Status board component built and wired to the projects data source.
Governance artefact library (PID, RAID, RACI templates) published to staging.
Accessibility pass completed on the core navigation.
upcoming: Migrate remaining legacy content from SharePoint.
Stakeholder UAT and sign-off with the leadership team.

risks.risk: Content owners slow to provide finalised copy.
risks.mitigation: Weekly content tracker and named owners per page.

risks.risk: Single developer dependency for the build.
risks.impact: Key-person risk on the delivery timeline.
risks.mitigation: Document build steps and pair a second engineer for handover.
